jobs.title: Resident Medical Officer (RMO)
jobs.description: Join our hospital operations team as an RMO. You will manage day-to-day clinical operations, attend to in-patients, coordinate with consultants, and ensure adherence to Syros care protocols.

jobs.title: Staff Nurse (ICU / General Ward)
jobs.description: We are looking for qualified nurses to deliver compassionate, protocol-driven care. ICU specialisation is a plus. You will work in a structured environment with clear SOPs and mentorship.

jobs.title: Hospital Administrator
jobs.description: Oversee hospital operations including staffing, supply chain, patient experience, billing, and compliance. You will work closely with the Syros Operations team to implement standardised systems.

jobs.title: Patient Care Executive
jobs.description: Serve as the first point of contact for patients - manage admissions, guide families, coordinate appointments, and ensure a smooth, empathetic care experience from entry to discharge.

jobs.title: Quality & Compliance Officer
jobs.description: Drive NABH-oriented quality initiatives across our hospitals. Conduct audits, maintain documentation, train staff on protocols, and report on key quality metrics.

jobs.title: Healthcare IT / EMR Specialist
jobs.description: Implement and support digital health systems - EMR, telemedicine, billing software, and analytics dashboards - across Syros-managed hospitals. Prior healthcare IT experience preferred.

jobs.title: Specialist Consultant (Various Departments)
jobs.description: Syros is empanelling specialists in General Surgery, Orthopaedics, Obstetrics, Internal Medicine, and Emergency Medicine. Visiting and full-time positions available.

jobs.title: Billing & Insurance Executive
jobs.description: Manage TPA empanelment, insurance claims, and transparent patient billing. You will ensure clean, ethical billing practices aligned with Syros standards.
